feat.name: Not so Fast!
feat.text: You lash out when foes try to get past you, possibly stopping them in their tracks. Make a melee Strike against the triggering creature. The Strike gains the following additional results.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.

feat.trigger: A creature within your reach leaves a square during a move action it’s using.
feat.success: The target takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speed for the rest of its triggering movement. This penalty might cause the triggering creature's movement to end immediately based on its affected Speed.
feat.failure: As success, but the target instead takes a –5-foot circumstance penalty to its Speed.
